Appearances:
Plaintiff Leslie Bahr is present.
Attorney Michael C. Hall appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendnt Veronica Portillo is present.
Attorney Daniel A. Ziatnik representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec. 17, 2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
